description: Visualize the Kubernetes cluster state described in '~/Desktop/cluster_dump.json' by creating a diagram. Represent each Node as a container labeled with its name, and place all assigned Pods (labeled with their names) inside their respective Node containers. Pods with a 'CrashLoopBackOff' status must be colored red. Calculate the total CPU requests (in millicores 'm') for each Node by summing the 'resources.requests.cpu' of its pods and add a text label to each Node container showing this sum. Save the diagram to '~/Diagrams/cluster_state.drawio' and export it as '~/Diagrams/cluster_state.png'.
